---
name: API Routes - Consult Documentation
description: "Use when building API routes in app/api/. Consult docs/gemini-codegen_instructions.md for Google Gemini API and docs/openai-docs-llms.txt for OpenAI API."
applyTo: "app/api/**/*.js"
---

# API Routes

When working with Gemini or OpenAI APIs, consult:
- `docs/gemini-codegen_instructions.md` for Google Gemini API
- `docs/openai-docs-llms.txt` for OpenAI API
